summary: The user sought healthy meal prep ideas and shared their morning routine of having green tea by 7:30 am. They discussed their recent cooking class experience where they learned to make sushi and planned to prepare a California roll and grilled eel for dinner, while also inquiring about herbal teas for focus and productivity.
facts: The user has been getting into a morning routine with green tea ready by 7:30 am. The user usually makes a big batch of quinoa salad on Sundays and portions it out for the week. The user has a favorite tea shop near their office for herbal tea in the afternoons. The user started taking a cooking class last month to learn how to make sushi from scratch. The user plans to make a classic California roll with crab and avocado and a new recipe with grilled eel and cucumber for dinner. The cooking class was a one-time workshop that the user found fantastic and would recommend to others. The user enjoys their green tea on its own but might add a small slice of lemon to cut the richness of the sushi. The user got all the ingredients for sushi last weekend. The user is planning to make sushi for dinner tonight.
